monitor.capture_what: The file path argument passed to open() at the sink, revealing path traversal

oracle_check.condition_description: The file path passed to open() contains path traversal sequences (../) or absolute paths outside the cache_dir, confirming the tainted value reaches the file sink without sanitization
oracle_check.raise_message_template: PATH_INJECTION: Tainted path reached file sink without sanitization — captured={captured} pattern={matched_pattern}

_meta.function_signature: def postprocess_image(format: str, value: np.ndarray | PIL.Image.Image | str | Path | None, cache_dir: str, watermark: WatermarkOptions | None)
